message:
feat(wa-core): add native WezTerm event listener behind native-wezterm feature

Introduce NativeEventListener (401 lines) that binds a Unix domain
socket and accepts newline-delimited JSON events from a vendored
WezTerm build. Supports all event types from the design doc: PaneOutput
(base64-decoded, bounded to 64KB), StateChange, UserVarChanged,
PaneCreated, and PaneDestroyed. Includes protocol version handshake
(hello message), per-connection async reading with 512KB line limit,
and graceful shutdown via AtomicBool flag.

Wired into wa-core via #[cfg(feature = "native-wezterm")] module
declaration and new Cargo feature flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
